scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run lan && concurrently -k -n shared,backend,frontend -c gray,magenta,cyan "npm:dev -w @jeoparty/shared" "npm:dev -w @jeoparty/backend" "npm:dev -w @jeoparty/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @jeoparty/backend && npm run build -w @jeoparty/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @jeoparty/backend && npm run lint -w @jeoparty/frontend
